description: Egnyte provides a secure content cloud for file sharing, collaboration, governance, and AI-powered content workflows. It is used by businesses to store, manage, secure, and work with organizational content, especially in regulated industries.
summary: Egnyte exposes a tenant-scoped REST Public API authenticated with OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens, plus a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp-server.egnyte.com/mcp` using OAuth.
